economic_notes: First Nation owns 99% interest in Mitawbik Ventures Limited Partnership (MVLP) engaged in leasing of plastics moulding equipment, and 100% of Mitawbik Ventures Inc. (general partner). Marina operations also conducted. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership reserve fund of $1,531,132. Drinking Water Class Action Settlement reserve of $500,000.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Audit report signed September 4, 2024. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Mitawbik Ventures Inc. and Mitawbik Ventures Limited Partnership. Marina is a consolidated department (not a GBE). Anishnawbek Nation transfers of $1,453,834 appear in 2023 only (zero in 2022 budget and prior year). Drinking Water Class Action Settlement reserve of $500,000 established in 2023. Cash figure of $6,658,048 estimated as $6,872,417 total less $214,369 short-term investments. No remuneration schedule included in provided text. Long-term debt not disclosed. Current liabilities not separately broken out in provided text.
